TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kalʉvʉnga/Ngani ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 252 buwan, 825 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 739 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 86 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 80%, Tayan 1%, Cou 3%, Hla'aluwa 4%, Paywan 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kalʉvʉnga hya' ga Tanguhla. tay mkyahu' na Kalʉvʉnga hya' ga Su'aci. squliq ka minkahul te hugal ga, blaq nha' mwah rgyax. 'llaw balay ktan qu qalang myan. baqun tmnga' kwara' rgryax nya'. tuqi 'san ungat kisya' nya'. "tuqi'"qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kal***ŋa/ŋani ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, ħlaʔaluwa *%, pajwan *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kal***ŋa ħjaʔ ɣa taŋuħla. taj mkjaħuʔ na kal***ŋa ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi. s~ɕquliq ka minkaħul te ħuɣal ɣa, βlaq nħaʔ mwaħ rɣjax. ʔllaw βalaj ktan qu qalaŋ mjan. βaqun tmŋaʔ kwaraʔ rɣrjax njaʔ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ njaʔ. "tuqiʔ"qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kalʉvʉnga/Ngani ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 252 buwan, 825 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 739 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 86 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 80%, Tayan 1%, Cou 3%, Hla'aluwa 4%, Paywan 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kalʉvʉnga hya' ga Tanguhla. tay mkyahu' na Kalʉvʉnga hya' ga Su'aci. squliq ka minkahul te hugal ga, blaq nha' mwah rgyax. 'llaw balay ktan qu qalang myan. baqun tmnga' kwara' rgryax nya'. tuqi 'san ungat kisya' nya'. "tuqi'"qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kal***ŋa/ŋani ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, ħlaʔaluwa *%, pajwan *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kal***ŋa ħjaʔ ɣa taŋuħla. taj mkjaħuʔ na kal***ŋa ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi. s~ɕquliq ka minkaħul te ħuɣal ɣa, βlaq nħaʔ mwaħ rɣjax. ʔllaw βalaj ktan qu qalaŋ mjan. βaqun tmŋaʔ kwaraʔ rɣrjax njaʔ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ njaʔ. "tuqiʔ"qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
